endpoints.name: List account stages
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple account stage records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch an account stage
endpoints.description: Fetches an account stage, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List Account Tiers
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple account tier records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch an account tier
endpoints.description: Fetches an account tier, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Upsert an account
endpoints.description:
Upserts an account record. The upsert_key dictates how the upsert will be performed. The create and update behavior
is exactly the same as the individual create and update endpoints.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List accounts
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple account records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create an account
endpoints.description:
Creates an account.

"domain" must be unique on the current team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch an account
endpoints.description: Fetches an account, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update an existing Account
endpoints.description:
Updates an account.

"domain" must be unique on the current team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete an account
endpoints.description:
Deletes an account. This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

Deleting an account will remove all connected people from that account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List call instructions
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple call instruction records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a call instructions
endpoints.description: Fetches a call instruction, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List actions
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple action records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters. Only actions that are currently "in_progess" will be returned by
this endpoint.

If the requester is not an admin, this endpoint will only return actions belonging to the requester.
If the request is an admin, this endpoint will return actions for the entire team. Additionaly, an admin
may use the user_guid parameter to request actions that belong to specific users on the team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch an action
endpoints.description:
Fetches an action, by ID only.
This endpoint will only return actions that are in_progress or pending_activity.
Once an action is complete, the request for that action will return a 404 status code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create an activity
endpoints.description:
Creates an activity. An activity will mark the associated action as completed. Currently,
only certain action types can have an activity explicitly created for them.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List calls
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple call records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a call
endpoints.description:
Creates a call. The parameters of this endpoint can be used to create an action
and ensure that the CRM Task is mapped correctly.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a call
endpoints.description: Fetches a call, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List emails
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple email records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch an email
endpoints.description: Fetches an email, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List Past Activities
endpoints.description: Fetches all of the customer's past activities for your application. Returns all the Activities that are found on the Salesloft Activity Feed. Visit here for more details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List bulk jobs
endpoints.description: Fetches multiple bulk job records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a bulk job
endpoints.description: Creates a bulk job. The type of the bulk job must be included when created. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List job data for a bulk job
endpoints.description: Fetches multiple job data records for a given bulk job. Pagination is not supported, but cursor based polling is via use of the `id[gt]` filter. Pass the last id seen (i.e. `id[gt]=1234`) in order to get the next batch of records.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BULK_JOBS_ID}} with a real bulk_jobs_id.

endpoints.name: Create job data for a bulk job
endpoints.description: Upload job data for the specified bulk job. Upload an array of objects, where element contains the parameters necessary to execute the individual calls. Each call to this endpoint can handle up to 5,000 records at a time. There is no limit to how many times you can create job data for a given bulk job. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BULK_JOBS_ID}} with a real bulk_jobs_id.

endpoints.name: List job data for a completed bulk job.
endpoints.description: Fetches multiple job data records for a completed bulk job. Note that until a bulk job's state is set to `done` the returned `data` will be an empty array. Pagination is not supported, but cursor based polling is via use of the `id[gt]` filter. Pass the last id seen (i.e. `id[gt]=1234`) in order to get the next batch of records.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BULK_JOBS_ID}} with a real bulk_jobs_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a bulk job
endpoints.description: Fetches a bulk job, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a bulk job
endpoints.description: Updates a bulk job's name and / or marks a bulk job as 'ready_to_execute'. May only be updated if the bulk job is still in an "open" state. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Export a cadence
endpoints.description: Exports a cadence as JSON.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Import cadences from JSON
endpoints.description: New cadences can be created or steps can be imported onto existing cadences which do not have steps. Visit here for more details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List cadence memberships
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple cadence membership records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters. A cadence membership is the association between a person and their current and
historical time on a cadence. Cadence membership records are mutable and change over time. If a person is
added to a cadence and re-added to the same cadence in the future, there is a single membership record.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a cadence membership
endpoints.description:
Adds a person to a cadence. person_id and cadence_id are required, and must be visible to the authenticated user. user_id will
default to the authenticated user, but can be set to any visible user on the authenticated team.

A person cannot be added to a cadence on behalf of a teammate unless the cadence is a team cadence, the cadence is owned by
the teammate, or the teammate has the Personal Cadence Admin permission.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a cadence membership
endpoints.description: Fetches a cadence membership, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a cadence membership
endpoints.description: Cadence Membership
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List cadences
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple cadence records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a cadence
endpoints.description: Fetches a cadence, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List calendar events
endpoints.description: Returns all calendar events, paginated and filtered by the date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Upsert a calendar event
endpoints.description:
Upserts a calendar event object.
  Upsert key is a combination of `id` and `i_cal_uid` scoped to the given `calendar_id`.
  Bulk operations:
  This endpoint is used for bulk operations, see https://developers.salesloft.com/bulk.html for integration instructions.
  Use `calendar/events/upsert` as an event type, and this spec as a data spec.
  This endpoint should be used directly for the time sensitive calendar event updates.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List call data records
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple call data records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Call data records are records of all inbound and outbound calls through Salesloft. A call data record may
be associated with a call, but does not have to be.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a call data record
endpoints.description: Fetches a call data record, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List call dispositions
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple call disposition records. The records can be sorted according to
the respective parameters. Call dispositions must be configured in application. This will
change in the future, but please contact us if you have a pressing use case.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List call sentiments
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple call sentiment records. The records can be sorted according to
the respective parameters. Call sentiments must be configured in application. This will
change in the future, but please contact us if you have a pressing use case.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create Conversations Call
endpoints.description: Enqueue a Conversations Call for processing

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

endpoints.name: Create an Live Website Tracking Parameter

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch current user
endpoints.description:
Authenticated user information. This endpoint does not accept any parameters as it is
represents your authenticated user. The "Users" resource provides user information
for other users on the team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List meetings
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple meeting records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to the respective parameters.
Meetings resource is responsible for events created via the Salesloft platform using calendaring features.
These events can relate to cadences, people, and accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Update a note

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a note
endpoints.description:
Deletes a note owned by authorized account.
This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create an ongoing action
endpoints.description:
Creates an ongoing action. An ongoing action is an action that is not yet completed,
but progress has been made towards the completion. The user should not need to do
anything for an ongoing action to be completed. An ongoing action can be later completed
by creating an activity.

Ongoing actions are marked as status=pending_activity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetches a list of emails ready to be sent by an external email service. Only emails sent with an External Email Client will appear here.
endpoints.description: Fetches a list of emails ready to be sent by an external email service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Updates the status of an email sent by an External Email Client
endpoints.description: Updates the status of an email sent by an External Email Client. Does not affect lofted emails.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

Fetches multiple step records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a step
endpoints.description: Fetches a step, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List successes
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple success records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List team tags
endpoints.description:
Fetches a list of the tags used for a team. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Tags can be applied to mulitple resource types.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List tasks
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple task records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a Task
endpoints.description: Creates a task.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a task
endpoints.description: Fetches a task, by ID only.

endpoints.name: Update a Task

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch current team
endpoints.description: Fetches the team of the authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List team template attachments
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple team template attachment records. The records can be filtered and paged according to
the respective parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List team templates
endpoints.description:
Fetches multiple team template records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Team templates are templates that are available team-wide. Admins may use
team templates to create original content for the entire team, monitor version control to ensure templates are always up to date,
and track template performance across the entire organization. All metrics on a team template reflect usage across the team; individual metrics can be found with the email_templates API endpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a team template
endpoints.description: Fetches a team template, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create a live feed item
endpoints.description: Creates a live feed item that can be sent to users. May only be used by whitelisted Frontend Integrations. Reference the Salesloft App Directory and Frontend Integrations sections for additional details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List users
endpoints.description:
Non Admin: Lists only your user, or all on team depending on group visibility policy
Team Admin: Lists users associated with your team
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a user
endpoints.description: Fetches a user, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List webhook subscriptions
endpoints.description: Fetches all of the customer's webhook subscriptions for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a webhook subscription
endpoints.description: Creates a webhook subscription. Visit the webhooks page for additional details and a list of available webhooks. Request must be made with a valid Oauth token or API key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fetch a webhook subscription
endpoints.description: Fetches a webhook subscription, by ID only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a webhook subscription
endpoints.description:
Updates a webhook subscription.
Request must be made with a valid Oauth token or API key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a webhook subscription
endpoints.description: Deletes a webhook subscription. This operation is not reversible without contacting support. This operation can be called multiple times successfully.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESLOFT_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SALESLOFT ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
